channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: politics
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: politics

item.title: Handshakes, murals and ministry: A reopened Texas prison focuses on rehabilitation
item.description: The Bartlett Unit in Williamson County will house 1,049 male inmates who will participate in educational programs aimed to help them secure a job after they’ve served their time.
item.dc:creator: Texas Tribune, By Pooja Salhotra, KPRC 2

item.title: Canadian town fined for refusing to celebrate Pride Month, fly rainbow flag
item.description: A Canadian town near the U.S. border was fined $10,000 for failing to proclaim June as "Pride Month" and for refusing to fly a "rainbow flag" to celebrate pride.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: What the cost-of-living adjustment increase in Social Security means
item.description: A 2.5% cost-of-living adjustment increase will mean an extra $50 a month for most Social Security and SSI recipients.
item.dc:creator: Jeff Arnold, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Social Security reforms face uncertain future in Senate
item.description: A House-passed bill to reform aspects of Social Security is lingering in the Senate as questions bubble up over its path forward.
item.dc:creator: Aris Folley, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Trump selects veteran law enforcement officer Chad Chronister for DEA administrator
item.description: President-elect Donald Trump announced he would nominate Florida Sheriff Chad Chronister to serve as the administrator for the Drug Enforcement Agency. “I am pleased to nominate Sheriff Chad Chronister for Administrator of the Drug Enforcement Agency (DEA),” he wrote in a post on Truth Social.
item.dc:creator: Ashleigh Fields, NewsNation

item.title: Trump threatens 100% tariff on the BRIC bloc of nations if they act to undermine US dollar
item.description: WEST PALM BEACH, Fla. (AP) — President-elect Donald Trump on Saturday threatened 100% tariffs against a bloc of nine nations if they act to undermine the U.S. dollar.
item.dc:creator: FATIMA HUSSEIN, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Democrats sound alarm on West Bank under Trump administration
item.description: House Democrats are sounding early alarms that Trump's administration will lead to a vast erosion of Palestinian rights and undermine efforts to bring peace to the volatile Middle East.
item.dc:creator: Mike Lillis, NewsNation

item.title: Trump and Republicans in Congress eye an ambitious 100-day agenda, starting with tax cuts
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — A tax break for millionaires, and almost everyone else. An end to the COVID-19-era government subsidies that some Americans have used to purchase health insurance. Limits to food stamps, including for women and children, and other safety net programs.
item.dc:creator: LISA MASCARO, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Emboldened 'manosphere' accelerates threats and demeaning language toward women after US election
item.description: CHICAGO (AP) — In the days after the presidential election, Sadie Perez began carrying pepper spray with her around campus. Her mom also ordered her and her sister a self-defense kit that included keychain spikes, a hidden knife key and a personal alarm.
item.dc:creator: CHRISTINE FERNANDO, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Donald Trump's call for 'energy dominance' is likely to run into real-world limits
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — President-elect Donald Trump is set to create a National Energy Council that he says will establish American “energy dominance” around the world as he seeks to boost U.S. oil and gas drilling and move away from President Joe Biden’s focus on climate change.
item.dc:creator: MATTHEW DALY, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Ranking the Democrats: Here's who the party could nominate next as president
item.description: Democrats are licking their wounds after Vice President Harris’s defeat to President-elect Trump, but already are looking toward who might lead their party in a 2028 presidential contest. It’s a fight that looks wide open.
item.dc:creator: Amie Parnes, NewsNation

item.title: Zuckerberg dines with Trump in Mar-a-Lago
item.description: A spokesperson for Meta confirmed that Zuckerberg and Trump met on Wednesday, saying he was invited for dinner with the president-elect to talk about the incoming administration.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, MPR News

item.title: Zuckerberg dines with Trump in Mar-a-Lago
item.description: FORT LAUDERDALE, Fla. (AP) — Donald Trump dined on Wednesday with Meta CEO Mark Zuckerberg at the president-elect’s Mar-a-Lago club in Florida, bringing together the Facebook founder and the former president who was once banned from that social network.
item.dc:creator: ADRIANA GOMEZ LICON, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Americans' opinion of Republican Party on the rise
item.description: In the poll, 45 percent of Americans said they feel “favorable” toward the Republican Party, up 6 points from an Economist/YouGov poll in late October, when 39 percent said they felt favorable toward GOP.
item.dc:creator: Tara Suter, NewsNation

item.title: Las Vegas Mayor Carolyn Goodman prepares to leave office, ending an era
item.description: Carolyn Goodman, who has served as Mayor of Las Vegas for 13 years, was honored with the renaming of Civic Plaza in her honor, and looks forward to the future with her husband Oscar.
item.dc:creator: John Langeler, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Lawmakers call for progress on marijuana law before end of Biden administration
item.description: Progressive lawmakers are calling on President Biden to take additional steps on federal marijuana law before his term comes to an end in January. In a letter sent to Biden and Vice President Harris, Democratic Reps. Barbara Lee (Calif.), Earl Blumenauer (Ore.) and Ilhan Omar (Minn.) and Sens.
item.dc:creator: Cheyanne M. Daniels, NewsNation

item.title: Biden team briefed Trump transition on Israel-Hezbollah ceasefire
item.description: President-elect Trump's transition team has received briefings from the chief architect of the Israel-Hezbollah ceasefire deal under President Biden, a senior administration official said Tuesday.
item.dc:creator: Laura Kelly, NewsNation

item.title: End of Trump prosecutions renews scrutiny of DOJ's pace
item.description: Special counsel Jack Smith's move to dismiss Donald Trump's two federal indictments has sparked finger-pointing from those eager to see the president-elect held to account, with critics airing their frustrations at the Department of Justice (DOJ) and the courts for the anticlimactic end to the case.
item.dc:creator: Rebecca Beitsch, NewsNation

item.title: Post-election poll: Trump victory, cabinet choices, war, and aliens through voters' eyes
item.description: President-elect Donald Trump's popularity is on the rise and the voters who went against him think World War III is likely.
item.dc:creator: Greg Haas, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Special counsel moves to dismiss election interference case against President-elect Donald Trump
item.description: Special counsel Jack Smith asked a federal judge to dismiss the case accusing President-elect Donald Trump of plotting to overturn the 2020 election.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, MPR News
